violations.description: CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Table in front used for self-service noted not in good repair.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling tile in ladies restroom noted wet-stained and bulging needs replacement. (also-repair any water leaks above this tile)
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Microwave interior not properly maintained needs routine cleaning.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided. ( Quat = 200 to 400 ppm )
STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Metal dispensing cups noted stored on a wet absorbent surface in front serving area.
